transcript.content: Make payout retry auto-release production-ready for tomorrow using the existing retryQueue context. Give me the shortest contract you need before proceeding.

Implementation is blocked because active records require Finance/Ops ratification before payout retry auto-release.

Concrete if ratified: auto-release only retryable transport failures with `providerIdempotencyKey` present, `manualReviewRequired === false`, `amountCents <= 25000`, `riskTier === "low"`, and exactly one retry after 15 minutes.

Still missing and not chosen: notification recipients, escalation/failure handling after the retry fails, and operational owner.

Confirm or correct before implementation.
